response.justification: Bogdan brings 17+ years of broad engineering experience across embedded, web, mobile, and distributed systems, with demonstrated proficiency in several of the required languages and real high-throughput systems work at Dunnhumby. However, the role's core requirements — experimentation platforms, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, rollout-risk management, and statistical/metrics analysis — are entirely absent from the resume. The candidate's current trajectory (AI tooling, full-stack product work) does not intersect meaningfully with growth and experimentation platform engineering, and there is no evidence of the cross-organizational, principal-level technical leadership or data aptitude the IC6 position demands.
strengths: Hands-on distributed systems experience handling millions of HTTP requests per second using async I/O, caching, and low-latency design at Dunnhumby
Broad, polyglot background (C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, PHP) covering most required languages
Consistent pattern of community leadership through workshops, talks, and open-source projects, demonstrating knowledge transfer and mentorship
concerns: Zero experimentation platform experience — no A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, experiment assignment, bias detection, or rollout automation anywhere in the resume
No telemetry, instrumentation, or metrics infrastructure work; no statistical analysis or data science background to support the high data-aptitude requirement
Title progression peaks at Staff level with no demonstrated principal/IC6-scope cross-team influence, unified platform ownership, or multi-workstream technical strategy

key_factors.factor: Missing telemetry and statistical analysis background
Strong distributed systems and polyglot engineering foundations
